_meta.description: Anthropic Claude Code built-in slash commands + bundled skills. This is the 'keeps coming' stream — Anthropic ships new ones with most CLI releases. Reconciled weekly against the authoritative docs by the refresh routine (see refresh-builtins.md).
_meta.note: subtype 'skill' = bundled skill invoked like a command; 'command' = native built-in. Removed commands (/vim, /pr-comments) are intentionally excluded.

commands.name: /clear
commands.desc: Start a new conversation with empty context.

commands.name: /compact
commands.desc: Free up context by summarizing the conversation so far.

commands.name: /context
commands.desc: Visualize current context usage as a colored grid.

commands.name: /rewind
commands.desc: Rewind the conversation and/or code to a previous point, or summarize from a selected message.

commands.name: /resume
commands.desc: Resume a conversation by ID or name, or open the session picker.

commands.name: /branch
commands.desc: Create a branch of the current conversation at this point.

commands.name: /rename
commands.desc: Rename the current session and show the name on the prompt bar.

commands.name: /recap
commands.desc: Generate a one-line summary of the current session on demand.

commands.name: /export
commands.desc: Export the current conversation as plain text.

commands.name: /copy
commands.desc: Copy the last assistant response to clipboard.

commands.name: /focus
commands.desc: Toggle the focus view: only your last prompt, a one-line tool-call summary, and the final response.

commands.name: /btw
commands.desc: Ask a quick side question without adding to the conversation.

commands.name: /diff
commands.desc: Open an interactive diff viewer showing uncommitted changes and per-turn diffs.

commands.name: /model
commands.desc: Switch the AI model and save it as your default for new sessions.

commands.name: /effort
commands.desc: Adjust how much reasoning effort the model spends.

commands.name: /fast
commands.desc: Toggle fast mode for quicker Opus output.

commands.name: /plan
commands.desc: Enter plan mode directly from the prompt.

commands.name: /ultraplan
commands.desc: Draft a plan in an ultraplan session, review it in your browser, then execute remotely or send it back to your terminal.

commands.name: /sandbox
commands.desc: Toggle sandbox mode.

commands.name: /usage
commands.desc: Show session cost, plan usage limits, and activity stats.

commands.name: /cost
commands.desc: Alias for /usage.

commands.name: /stats
commands.desc: Alias for /usage.

commands.name: /usage-credits
commands.desc: Configure usage credits to keep working when you hit a limit.

commands.name: /config
commands.desc: Open the Settings interface to adjust theme, model, output style, and other preferences.

commands.name: /theme
commands.desc: Change the color theme.

commands.name: /color
commands.desc: Change the terminal color theme.

commands.name: /statusline
commands.desc: Configure Claude Code's status line.

commands.name: /terminal-setup
commands.desc: Configure terminal keybindings for Shift+Enter and other shortcuts.

commands.name: /keybindings
commands.desc: Open or create your keybindings configuration file.

commands.name: /scroll-speed
commands.desc: Adjust mouse wheel scroll speed interactively with a live ruler preview.

commands.name: /output-style
commands.desc: Set the output style for responses (e.g. learning, explanatory).

commands.name: /init
commands.desc: Initialize the project with a CLAUDE.md guide.

commands.name: /memory
commands.desc: Edit CLAUDE.md memory files, enable or disable auto-memory, and view auto-memory entries.

commands.name: /add-dir
commands.desc: Add a working directory for file access during the current session.

commands.name: /agents
commands.desc: Manage agent (subagent) configurations.

commands.name: /mcp
commands.desc: Manage MCP server connections and OAuth authentication.

commands.name: /plugin
commands.desc: Manage Claude Code plugins.

commands.name: /hooks
commands.desc: View hook configurations for tool events.

commands.name: /skills
commands.desc: List available skills.

commands.name: /reload-plugins
commands.desc: Reload all active plugins to apply pending changes without restarting.

commands.name: /reload-skills
commands.desc: Re-scan skill and command directories so skills added or changed on disk become available.

commands.name: /run-skill-generator
commands.desc: Teach /run and /verify how to build, launch, and drive your project's app by writing a per-project skill.

commands.name: /review
commands.desc: Review a pull request locally in your current session.

commands.name: /code-review
commands.desc: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and cleanups at a chosen effort level.

commands.name: /security-review
commands.desc: Analyze pending changes on the current branch for security vulnerabilities.

commands.name: /ultrareview
commands.desc: Run a deep, multi-agent code review in a cloud sandbox.

commands.name: /simplify
commands.desc: Review the changed code for cleanup opportunities and apply the fixes.

commands.name: /verify
commands.desc: Confirm a code change does what it should by building and running the app and observing the result.

commands.name: /run
commands.desc: Launch and drive your project's app to see a change working in the running app, not just in tests.

commands.name: /debug
commands.desc: Enable debug logging and troubleshoot issues by reading the session debug log.

commands.name: /background
commands.desc: Detach the current session to run as a background agent and free this terminal.

commands.name: /tasks
commands.desc: List and manage background tasks.

commands.name: /stop
commands.desc: Stop the current background session.

commands.name: /workflows
commands.desc: Open the workflow progress view to watch, pause, resume, or save running and completed workflows.

commands.name: /batch
commands.desc: Orchestrate large-scale changes across a codebase in parallel, each unit in its own worktree.

commands.name: /loop
commands.desc: Run a prompt repeatedly while the session stays open.

commands.name: /schedule
commands.desc: Create, update, list, or run routines that execute on Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure.

commands.name: /remote-control
commands.desc: Make this session available for remote control from claude.ai.

commands.name: /remote-env
commands.desc: Configure the default remote environment for web sessions started with --remote.

commands.name: /teleport
commands.desc: Pull a Claude Code on the web session into this terminal.

commands.name: /web-setup
commands.desc: Connect your GitHub account to Claude Code on the web using your local gh CLI credentials.

commands.name: /desktop
commands.desc: Continue the current session in the Claude Code Desktop app.

commands.name: /autofix-pr
commands.desc: Spawn a Claude Code on the web session that watches the current branch's PR and pushes fixes when CI fails or reviewers comment.

commands.name: /install-github-app
commands.desc: Set up the Claude GitHub Actions app for a repository.

commands.name: /install-slack-app
commands.desc: Install the Claude Slack app.

commands.name: /chrome
commands.desc: Configure Claude in Chrome settings.

commands.name: /ide
commands.desc: Manage IDE integrations and show status.

commands.name: /login
commands.desc: Sign in to your Anthropic account.

commands.name: /logout
commands.desc: Sign out from your Anthropic account.

commands.name: /upgrade
commands.desc: Open the upgrade page to switch to a higher plan tier.

commands.name: /status
commands.desc: Open the Settings interface (Status tab) showing version, model, account, and connectivity.

commands.name: /doctor
commands.desc: Diagnose and verify your Claude Code installation and settings.

commands.name: /help
commands.desc: Show help and available commands.

commands.name: /release-notes
commands.desc: View the changelog in an interactive version picker.

commands.name: /feedback
commands.desc: Submit feedback, report a bug, or share your conversation.

commands.name: /privacy-settings
commands.desc: View and update your privacy settings.

commands.name: /heapdump
commands.desc: Write a JS heap snapshot and memory breakdown to ~/Desktop for diagnostics.

commands.name: /exit
commands.desc: Exit the CLI.

commands.name: /setup-bedrock
commands.desc: Configure Amazon Bedrock authentication, region, and model pins through an interactive wizard.

commands.name: /setup-vertex
commands.desc: Configure Google Vertex AI authentication, project, region, and model pins through an interactive wizard.

commands.name: /insights
commands.desc: Generate a report analyzing your Claude Code sessions: project areas, interaction patterns, and friction points.

commands.name: /team-onboarding
commands.desc: Generate a team onboarding guide from your Claude Code usage history.

commands.name: /powerup
commands.desc: Discover Claude Code features through quick interactive lessons with animated demos.

commands.name: /fewer-permission-prompts
commands.desc: Scan transcripts for common read-only calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project settings.

commands.name: /passes
commands.desc: Share a free week of Claude Code with friends.

commands.name: /stickers
commands.desc: Order Claude Code stickers.

commands.name: /mobile
commands.desc: Show a QR code to download the Claude mobile app.

commands.name: /radio
commands.desc: Open Claude FM lo-fi radio in your browser.

commands.name: /goal
commands.desc: Set or clear a session goal.

commands.name: /tui
commands.desc: Toggle fullscreen TUI mode.

commands.name: /voice
commands.desc: Voice input controls (tap or push-to-talk).

commands.name: /deep-research
commands.desc: Fan out web searches on a question, fetch and cross-check sources, and synthesize a cited report.

commands.name: /claude-api
commands.desc: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps.
